title: The responsibilities of engagement partners and team members are not properly defined or understood
description: Training and clarification procedures implemented for engagement partner and team member responsibilities.
root_cause: Ref: 5.01. Objectives: 5a, 5b. Responses: MEP-01, MEP-02, MEP-08

title: Engagement partners and other team members are not adequately engaged
description: Possibility of inadequate engagement. Company has implemented robust procedures.
root_cause: Ref: 5.02. Objectives: 5a, 5b. Responses: MEP-01, MEP-03 to MEP-11

title: Inadequate direction, supervision, and review of engagement team work
description: Can lead to omissions or errors in the work performed.
root_cause: Ref: 5.03. Objectives: 5b. Responses: MEP-01, MEP-03, MEP-04, MEP-05

title: The company methodology is not properly followed
description: Robust methodology developed with adequate training provided.
root_cause: Ref: 5.07. Objectives: 5b. Responses: MEP-03, MEP-05, MEP-08

title: Candidates employed are not adequately qualified for quality engagements
description: Importance of hiring individuals with suitable qualifications acknowledged.
root_cause: Ref: 6.01. Objectives: 6a. Responses: MR-01, MR-02, MR-03, MR-05

title: Specific hiring needs are not identified in a timely manner
description: Workforce planning implemented to avoid delays.

title: The company loses intellectual capital due to inefficient succession planning
description: Risk of knowledge loss due to staff turnover without succession plan.

title: Individuals do not have sufficient hours to fulfill responsibilities
description: Risk of overwork leading to quality issues.

title: Manual and computer systems supporting information are inadequate
description: Continual investment in modernisation of information systems.

title: QMS not sufficiently adapted for quality management needs
description: Concrete steps taken to enhance quality management system.

title: Information relevant to QMS not communicated appropriately
The company fails to foster accountability culture for information sharing
description: Organisational culture promoting information sharing cultivated.

title: Monitoring and remediation process not conducted in a timely manner
description: Proactive measures implemented for timely monitoring.

title: Selection of engagements for review may be inadequate
description: Well-defined criteria for selection of review engagements.
root_cause: Ref: 8.03. Objectives: 8c, 8d. Responses: MMR-06 to MMR-11

title: Deficiencies may not be detected in other engagements of similar nature
